ComponentType: 3V 128M-bit Serial Flash Memory with Dual/Quad SPI
Description: The W25Q128JV is a 128M-bit (16MB) serial flash memory designed for systems with limited space, pins, and power. It operates from a single 2.7V to 3.6V supply and supports standard SPI, Dual I/O SPI, and Quad I/O SPI interfaces, enabling high-speed data transfer with clock frequencies up to 133MHz. The memory is organized into 65,536 programmable pages of 256 bytes each, with flexible erase options (4KB sector, 32KB block, 64KB block, or full chip erase). It includes features such as software/hardware reset, write protection, security registers, a 64-bit unique ID, and low power consumption down to 1µA in power-down mode, making it suitable for code execution (XIP), data storage, and parameter storage in embedded systems.

KeyParameters.Erase Sectors/Blocks: 4,096 sectors (4 KB each) / 256 blocks (64 KB each)
KeyParameters.Interface Support: Standard SPI, Dual I/O SPI, Quad I/O SPI

Functions.FunctionDescription: Data output in standard SPI; bidirectional I/O in Dual/Quad modes
Hardware write protect when low; bidirectional I/O in Quad mode
Data input in standard SPI; bidirectional I/O in Dual/Quad modes
Pauses serial communication when low; bidirectional I/O in Quad mode
